title: Bound autoresearch integration for local sweeps
description: Define a bounded way to use karpathy/autoresearch for local Parameter Golf sweeps without letting it own strategy. Cover the target file contract, proxy metric, import path back into leaderboard.md, and when autoresearch results are promotion-worthy.

title: Run flat-stream sliding-window accounting check on confirmed baseline
description: Implement the first post-baseline evaluation experiment against baseline-sp1024-mlx-confirmed-s1 by adding a flat-stream sliding-window accounting harness, comparing it against the current non-overlapping baseline metric, and preserving the result through the standard artifact and promotion discipline if it is informative.

title: Build telemetry spine, visualizations, PDF paper ingestion, and branch-source-of-truth workflow
description: Add append-only experiment telemetry and figure generation, make arXiv review download selected PDFs, and collapse branch workflow so one source-of-truth branch remains after task completion.

title: Review external BPB@500 opinion and add social/arxiv research hooks
description: Review the vukrosic fork and BPB@500 claim, decide what signal belongs in the repo, and add tested hookable research tooling for X/bird-cli and arXiv searches with query draining.

title: Run first local baseline proxy
description: Execute the first 500-step medium-horizon proxy on the frozen local MLX sp1024 baseline path, audit the log and artifact size, and record whether the baseline workflow remains stable before any confirmatory split or lane selection.

title: Scaffold Parameter Golf research workspace
description: Convert parametergolf into a standalone research workspace modeled on creativedecomp and resattn, with state docs, prereg, results index, iteration archive, leaderboard tracking, hooks, and initial strategy docs grounded in the official Parameter Golf repo and researchdocs.

title: Run baseline confirmatory split on shard 1
description: Extend the local sp1024 cache to a second training shard, isolate fineweb_train_000001.bin as the confirmatory train slice, run the 1000-step confirmatory baseline path on MLX, audit the log and artifact size, and decide whether any baseline artifact is promotion-worthy.

title: Plan first high-signal Parameter Golf experiment lane
description: Choose the first high-signal experiment lane for this repo after the scaffold lands. Compare optimizer, evaluation, tokenizer, mixed-precision, and recurrence lanes using the current public frontier and the local hardware constraints.

title: Define local baseline proxy and confirmatory split
description: Define the local baseline workflow, including a pilot proxy, a confirmatory split, and the minimum checks required before a result can be promoted into iterations/golden. This task should also specify how public validation is used without becoming the only feedback loop.

title: Run confirmatory sliding-window accounting check after proxy
description: Starting from the new flat-stream eval harness and the positive 1,048,576-target proxy on baseline-sp1024-mlx-confirmed-s1, run a larger-budget confirmatory sliding-window accounting check. Budget the local run explicitly against the full cached validation stream (62,021,632 targets), preserve tmux/logging details up front, and decide whether the eval-only gain is strong enough to justify promotion or whether the next evaluation step should skip to document-isolated accounting instead.

title: Review dynamic evaluation memo and integrate disciplined TTT lane
Automate experiment launch, ingestion, promotion, and onboarding
description: Replace the still-manual experiment loop with a launch/promote flow, add minimal validation helpers, correct stale repo state, and add a first-step onboarding doc so fresh agents start correctly.

title: Choose official code import strategy
description: Decide how the official openai/parameter-golf code should enter this repo: sibling clone, vendored copy, submodule, or imported snapshots. The decision must preserve clean iteration archiving and avoid ambiguity about the source of truth for train_gpt.py revisions.

title: Add official PR intelligence workflow
description: Add a persistent official PR-review workflow for this repo. It should dedupe already seen PRs from openai/parameter-golf, store machine-readable review state, generate normalized PR snapshots, maintain a deduped atomic experiment backlog, and update AGENTS.md so each iteration starts with a subagent review or explicit fallback script run.
